LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, JAN-07-2021 HEARING HELD RE: PLAINTIFF AMER ICAN CREDIT ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING, AND RULES AS FOLLOWS: APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REFLECTING THAT THE APPLICATION IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED, AND SUBMIT THE PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT BY EMAIL AT CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: CHRISTINE L. JORDAN, CSR NO. 12262, CJORDAN@SFTC.ORG (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2021 Continued To Jun-16-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-07-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. SHANT HAGOPIAN, Esq. of Hagopian Law Firm (Tel: 818-886-1361) appearing for plaintiff American Credit Acceptance, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CREDIT ACCEPTANCE, LLC's Application For Writ Of Possession.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and rules as follows: Application for Writ of Possession is granted as unopposed.

Plaintiff's counsel is to prepare a proposed order reflecting that the application is granted as unopposed, and submit the proposed order to the court by email at contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Christine L. Jordan, CSR No. 12262, cjordan@sftc.org (302/EPS)
